content:

ANODE - **Footer:** - DOCUMENT NUMBER: 98ASB42226B - Electronic versions are uncontrolled except when accessed directly from the Document Repository. Printed versions are uncontrolled except when stamped "CONTROLLED COPY" in red. - DESCRIPTION: SOT-23 (TO-236) 2.90x1.30x1.00 1.90P - PAGE 2 OF 2 - Legal text about trademarks and liability. - Copyright notice: © Semiconductor Components Industries, LLC, 2019 - Website: www.onsemi.com **2. Structure the JSON:** I will create a list of dictionaries, where each dictionary represents a block of text with its bounding box. - Title block - Date block - The main table-like structure with styles and pinouts. I'll format this as a list of lists or a single string for each style to keep it readable. - Footer blocks (Document Number, Description, Page, Legal text, Copyright, Website). Let's refine the main content extraction. It's essentially a table. Columns: Style Name, Pin 1, Pin 2, Pin 3. Rows: Each style definition. I will combine the style name and its details into a single string for clarity, or separate them if it makes more sense. Given the layout, it's more like a list of definitions. Let's go through each style: - STYLE 1 THRU 5: CANCELLED - STYLE 6: PIN 1. BASE, 2. EMITTER, 3. COLLECTOR - STYLE 7: PIN 1. EMITTER, 2. BASE, 3. COLLECTOR - STYLE 8: PIN 1. ANODE, 2. CATHODE-ANODE - STYLE 20: PIN 1. CATHODE, 2. ANODE, 3. GATE - STYLE 21: PIN 1. GATE, 2. SOURCE, 3. DRAIN - STYLE 22: PIN 1. RETURN, 2. OUTPUT, 3. INPUT - STYLE 23: PIN 1. ANODE, 2. ANODE, 3. CATHODE - STYLE 24: PIN 1. GATE, 2. DRAIN, 3. SOURCE - STYLE 25: PIN 1. ANODE, 2. CATHODE, 3. GATE - STYLE 26: PIN 1. CATHODE, 2. ANODE, 3. NO CONNECTION - STYLE 27: PIN 1. CATHODE, 2. CATHODE, 3.
